name: npc-expression-group-prompt-sidecars
title: NPC expression group prompt sidecars
description: Change NPC expression sprite prompt provenance from one sidecar per expression image to one shared sidecar per expression set.
creator: lijin
notes: Completed 2026-05-02; refined 2026-05-03. Changed NPC expression prompt provenance from one prompt file per sprite to one expression-set.prompt.md per character directory. The group sidecar now keeps only the natural/neutral single-image prompt in ## Final prompt to avoid five-expression contact-sheet generation, while still covering all assets/hashes. Validation and focused tests passed.

meta.user_request: NPC role images do not need one prompt file per image; keep one prompt sidecar per expression set.
meta.convention: Independent images use <image-stem>.prompt.md; one character NPC expression set uses expression-set.prompt.md. The sidecar lists every asset/expression/hash, but ## Final prompt contains only the natural/neutral single-image prompt.
